category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the CLI for headscale, an open-source implementation of the Tailscale control server; official docs cover headscale command-line usage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide headscale-cli.
docs_sources: Official Headscale documentation provides getting-started guidance and a remote CLI reference for the headscale command.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/juanfont/headscale, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Headscale and Tailscale control-server functionality; source_facts.executables lists headscale.
